'''âng-th-g-v''' ('''kangathgevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chapel|chapel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chapel|chapel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-th-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| kangathgevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingathgevoko|thingathgevoko]] || [[word:jingathgevoko|jingathgevoko]] || [[word:shingathgevoko|shingathgevoko]] || [[word:kingathgevoko|kingathgevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungathgevoko|thuthungathgevoko]] || [[word:jujungathgevoko|jujungathgevoko]] || [[word:shushungathgevoko|shushungathgevoko]] || [[word:kukungathgevoko|kukungathgevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
